name: Almond-Pumkin Muffins with Struesel Topping
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------
Strusssel Topping:
1/4 c Sugar
1/2 ts Cinnamon
2 tb Flour
1 tb Margarine
Preheat oven to 350 and spray muffin cups with cooking spray.
Cream together margarine, sugar, and molasses. Add egg whites and pumpkin. Add dry ingredients and stir until moistened. Add almonds. Fill muffin cups 3/4 full.
Combine strusssel topping ingredients, cutting in margarine until mixture is crumbly. Sprinkle strusssel topping over muffin batter. Bake for 35-40 minutes until wooden pick comes out clean.
